sql select urut,id,nama from ( (select -1 as urut,id,nama from master_ruang_induk where id='0') union all (select 0 as urut,0 as id,'' as nama from master_ruang_induk limit 1) union all (select id as urut,id,nama from master_ruang_induk where id_cabang='16' and aktif <>'N' and (case when nama like '%pustu%' or nama like '%polindes%' or nama like '%desa%' or nama like '%ponkesdes%' or nama like '%luar gedung%' then 1 else 0 end) = '0') ) as hasil order by urut

coba create temporary table kunjungan as (select noid, waktu,id_sep from rekam_medis,master_ruang_induk where rekam_medis.id_ruang=master_ruang_induk.id and rekam_medis.id_cabang='16' and rekam_medis.waktu >='1990-01-01 00:00:00' and rekam_medis.waktu <='1990-01-01 23:59:59' and (case when master_ruang_induk.nama like '%pustu%' or master_ruang_induk.nama like '%polindes%' or master_ruang_induk.nama like '%luar gedung%' or master_ruang_induk.nama like '%desa%' or master_ruang_induk.nama like '%ponkesdes%' then 1 else 0 end) = '0' );select noid,max(waktu) as waktux,max(id_sep) as id_sep from kunjungan group by noid order by waktux desc
